package main

import (
	"fmt"
)

type GapBuffer struct {
	data []rune
	gap  int
	size int
}

func NewGapBuffer(initialSize int) *GapBuffer {
	gb := &GapBuffer{
		data: make([]rune, initialSize),
		gap:  initialSize,
		size: 0,
	}
	return gb
}

func (gb *GapBuffer) MoveGap(position int) {
	if position < 0 || position > gb.size {
		return
	}
	if position < gb.gap {
		for i := position; i < gb.gap; i++ {
			gb.data[i], gb.data[i+gb.gap-position] = gb.data[i+gb.gap-position], gb.data[i]
		}
	} else {
		for i := gb.gap; i < position; i++ {
			gb.data[i-gb.gap+position] = gb.data[i]
		}
	}
	gb.gap = position
}

func (gb *GapBuffer) Delete(start, end int) {
	if start < 0 || end > gb.size || start >= end {
		return
	}
	copy(gb.data[start:], gb.data[end:gb.size])
	gb.size -= (end - start)
	gb.gap -= (end - start)
}

func (gb *GapBuffer) Insert(runes []rune) {
	for _, r := range runes {
		if gb.size < len(gb.data) {
			gb.data[gb.gap] = r
			gb.gap++
			gb.size++
		}
	}
}

func (gb *GapBuffer) String() string {
	return string(gb.data[:gb.size])
}

func main() {
	gb := NewGapBuffer(10)
	gb.Insert([]rune("Hello"))
	gb.MoveGap(5)
	gb.Insert([]rune(" World"))
	gb.Delete(5, 11)
	fmt.Println(gb.String()) // Output: Hello
}
